text: Effective team management requires balancing several key skills. Clear communication ensures everyone understands their tasks and the team's goals. Delegation is equally important: assign tasks based on each member's strengths, but avoid overloading anyone. Regular feedback helps people improve and feel valued, while motivation keeps the team engaged and productive. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial. When disagreements arise, address them quickly by listening to all sides and finding a fair solution. By mastering these elements, a manager can build a cohesive, high-performing team where everyone contributes their best.
